goal: Build a mobile robot with Nav2 navigation config: a Carter wheeled robot wrapped via setup_nav_robot. Realizes #31 RoboParty (mixed fleet) infrastructure for the mobile-robot leg.
thoughts:
Six nav-robot specifics for CP-64:
1) Carter wheeled robot at [0, 0, 0.10] (small wheel-base AMR).
2) setup_nav_robot wraps with Nav2 config: goal_topic=/goal_pose, odom_topic=/odom.
3) NO occupancy_map for canonical demo — runtime would set this from a real map.
4) NO arm — pure mobile robot scenario.
5) Realizes #31 RoboParty mobile leg. Full scenario also has manipulator + ROS2 bridge + Nav2.
6) Runtime nav stack execution requires Nav2 + ROS2 bridge active.
code:
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

# Carter (NVIDIA AMR) wheeled robot
robot_wizard(
    robot_name="carter",
    dest_path="/World/Carter",
    position=[0, 0, 0.10],
    orientation=[1, 0, 0, 0],
)

setup_nav_robot(
    robot_path="/World/Carter",
    occupancy_map="",
    nav_topic="/goal_pose",
    odom_topic="/odom",
)
extension_notes: CP-64 realizes #31 RoboParty mobile-robot leg. Carter (NVIDIA AMR) wrapped with Nav2 config. Full RoboParty scenario adds manipulator partner + ROS2 bridge for Nav2 communication.
failure_modes: Carter robot must be in robot_wizard registry — alias 'carter' → 'nova_carter' per code.
No occupancy map specified — runtime nav would need actual map data.
Verify_args is loose (mobile robots aren't pick-place); form-gate skip.
code_template:
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

# Carter (NVIDIA AMR) wheeled robot
robot_wizard(
    robot_name={{primary_robot.class}},
    dest_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    position={{primary_robot.position}},
    orientation={{primary_robot.orientation}},
)

setup_nav_robot(
    robot_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    occupancy_map="",
    nav_topic="/goal_pose",
    odom_topic="/odom",
)
